negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_b690d0f9-3f65-4340-aaf6-479c9d2797c7
prompt: A point-of-view video captured from inside a car, positioned at an intersection in a sunny suburban neighborhood. The dashboard is visible at the bottom of the frame, suggesting the camera is mounted on the windshield. The scene is illuminated by bright sunlight, casting long shadows across the asphalt. Large, leafy trees dominate the background, their branches spreading wide and creating a canopy over the street. Reflections of these trees are visible on the hood and windshield of the ego vehicle, adding depth to the scene.  On the left side, a white house with a sloped roof is partially obscured by the trees. A stop sign stands on the right side of the intersection, near the curb, where a few parked cars are visible. The road markings and traffic signs indicate various directions and restrictions for vehicles at the intersection. A one-way sign and a right-turn only sign are visible at different locations. A bicycle sign can be seen near the trees at the center of the intersection. A sidewalk is also visible on the left side of the intersection.  As the video progresses, the car begins to move forward through the intersection, navigating the roundabout. The trees continue to cast shadows over the road, and the stop sign remains stationary. The white house on the left becomes more prominent as the car moves closer to it. The road markings for the roundabout become clearer, guiding the driver's path. The scene remains calm, with no other vehicles or pedestrians visible, emphasizing the quiet, suburban environment.
